settings.heading: Professional embroidered polos, hats, jackets and uniforms.
settings.lead: Give your business, school or team a clean professional finish with embroidery equipment and finished stitched samples shown in the uploaded photos.
settings.body:
The photo set includes multi-head embroidery machines, a close-up embroidered cap and a gray leadership quarter-zip with a stitched left-chest logo. Those examples are ideal for buyers who need a polished apparel option beyond printed shirts.

Use embroidery for caps, pullovers, polos, jackets, uniforms, staff apparel, team gear and corporate apparel that should look professional over repeated wear.

settings.heading: Machines, caps and stitched apparel from uploaded photos.
settings.intro: The embroidery gallery shows actual equipment and finished stitch details customers can evaluate before quoting.
